title: coelandria concavissima
intro: Coelandria concavissima is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical forests of Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coelandria concavissima are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Coelandria concavissima include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
